pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4 (2024-04-30); C-PCR-003 Concrete and Concrete Elements (2024-04-30)
lca_tool: One Click LCA Pre-verified EPD Generator

verification.verifier: Andrew D. Moore, Life Cycle Logic Pty Ltd

scope: Cradle to gate (A1-A3) with modules C1-C4 and D; A4-A5 not declared
notes: Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 134); source gives no A1/A2/A3 split → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.
A4 and A5 not declared (ND) — narrower scope than some EPDs; no construction stage.
Declared-unit mass = 2373 kg (p8); a conservative generic density of 2400 kg/m3 was used for end-of-life modelling only (p6). mass_kg uses the declared-unit value.
Registration rendered 'EPD-IES-23043' in the document vs '0023043' in the source filename — canonical id normalized to IES-0023043.
Declaration owner is Piave Premix Concrete; EPD produced by Crema Constructions (manufacturer = declaration owner).
No EN 15804+A1 table published → gwp_a1a3_alt omitted. summary_extras omitted (net freshwater on resource-use table not captured).
